name: 00B8_ice_patch
prompt:
First-person walking perspective at chest height along a damp residential park path. The dark asphalt stretches ahead through open winter grass, bare trees lining both sides.

A patch of black ice becomes visible on the asphalt ahead — a glassy, nearly transparent sheet sitting flush with the path surface, difficult to distinguish from wet pavement. It spans most of the path width. The reflective sheen catches the grey sky above as the camera approaches.

The ice patch fills the lower frame now. The glassy surface shows faint air bubbles trapped beneath. The surrounding asphalt is dark and damp. There is no safe dry route around the ice — it stretches from edge to edge across the walkable surface.
negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
